title: Auth User Details
description: Verify GET /auth/v1/user returns correct profile for logged in user.

title: Verify Stores List endpoint
description: Perform GET on /rest/v1/stores and verify 200 OK with appropriate RLS for Admin.

title: Verify Stores List unauthorized
description: Perform GET on /rest/v1/stores without token and verify 401 Unauthorized.
